# docs-workflow-tech-review

Technical accuracy review of documentation drafts with optional code-learner validation. When code analysis is available, validates documentation claims against learn-code analysis data before dispatching the technical-reviewer agent. Iteration logic is owned by the orchestrator, not this skill.


**Plugin**: [docs-skills](index.md) | **:material-check: User-invocable**

## Usage

```bash
/docs-workflow-tech-review
```
